label: MiniMax-M2.7 context window is confirmed at 204800 tokens; registry placeholder should become concrete

OpenCode --variant mapping remains unverified; do not treat variant high as MiniMax highspeed

reason: Official docs expose highspeed as a separate model/pricing class, while the MiniMax API docs do not define OpenCode variant mapping.
